extraction.one_line_summary: WOODS Mike won UAE Tour Stage 2 uphill sprint with 522W for 2:35 at 62kg, beating MOLOMAR by one second overall
tactical_patterns: Woods produced 522W for 2:35 at 62kg to win uphill sprint, revealing power benchmarks for early-season hilly finishes.
Trek Segafredo aggressively defended one-second lead next stage using three-man breakaway including Brambila who ultimately won GC.

rider_signals.WOODS Mike: positive: strongest rider on final climb but lost GC by 5 seconds despite superior form, suggesting ISN lacked numerical support
rider_signals.BRAMBILA Gianluca: positive: first win in 4+ years riding aggressively with smile, held 2-minute advantage over woods on Col d'Ambodon
rider_signals.MOLOMAR: neutral: lost stage but Trek immediately protected his 1-second GC lead with coordinated three-rider break strategy
